summary: All 3 post-creation bug fixes verified successfully. Issue 1: Share link resolution fixed - frontend /t/:shareCode correctly calls /api/share/{shareCode}. Issue 2: Email validation working - phone-based invites skip email sending gracefully. Issue 3: Seller 'Confirm Fee Agreement' UI displays fee breakdown and button, status transitions from PENDING to CONFIRMED (Ready for Payment).
passed_tests: ✅ Issue 1 FIX: GET /api/share/{share_code} endpoint accessible without auth
✅ Issue 1 FIX: Frontend /t/:shareCode route correctly calls /api/share/{shareCode} (verified via request interception)
✅ Issue 1 FIX: Share link displays transaction preview with all details (item, price, fee, parties)
✅ Issue 1 FIX: Invalid share code returns 404 with 'Transaction Not Found' UI
✅ Issue 2 FIX: Transaction creation with phone number (instead of email) succeeds
✅ Issue 2 FIX: Email service validates email before sending (skips empty/invalid)
✅ Issue 2 FIX: Transaction creation with valid email works normally
✅ Issue 3 FIX: Seller sees 'Confirm Fee Agreement' card with fee breakdown
✅ Issue 3 FIX: Fee Summary shows Item Price, TrustTrade Fee (2%), Fee Paid By, You will receive
✅ Issue 3 FIX: 'Confirm Fee Agreement' button with data-testid='seller-confirm-btn' present
✅ Issue 3 FIX: Clicking confirm changes status from 'Pending Seller Confirmation' to 'Ready for Payment'
✅ Issue 3 FIX: After confirmation, 'Create TrustTrade Escrow' card appears
✅ Backend: Minimum transaction amount (R500) validation working
✅ Backend: Non-seller cannot confirm transaction (403 returned)

critical_code_review_comments.comment: FIX VERIFIED: Line 36 now correctly uses `${API_URL}/api/share/${shareCode}` instead of `${API_URL}/share/${shareCode}`
FIX VERIFIED: send_email() now validates email with `if not to_email or not to_email.strip() or '@' not in to_email` before attempting to send
FIX VERIFIED: Seller Confirmation card now shows Fee Summary with Item Price, TrustTrade Fee (2%), Fee Paid By badge, and 'You will receive' calculation
FIX VERIFIED: seller-confirm endpoint has improved logging and returns status='Ready for Payment' on success

test_credentials: Created test users via mongosh: buyer_session_1775483294494, seller_session_1775483294494 (cleaned up after testing)
seed_data_creation: Created test transaction txn_792aa4d67f0c with share_code TT-131972 for UI testing (cleaned up)
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 3 post-creation bug fixes verified: (1) ShareTransaction.js line 36 now uses /api/share/ prefix, (2) email_service.py validates email before sending, (3) TransactionDetail.js shows seller fee confirmation UI with breakdown. Full flow tested: Create transaction -> Open share link -> Seller confirms fee agreement -> Status moves from PENDING to CONFIRMED (Ready for Payment). Backend tests in /app/backend/tests/test_post_creation_fixes.py cover all scenarios.
